latest_user_requested_research_summary.scope: M3W long-goal routes tried, failures, failure reasons, successes, current deployable status, claim boundaries, and next steps
latest_user_requested_research_summary.current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 composite-tail safe-switch bounded neural dynamics under Stage37/teacher safety floor
latest_user_requested_research_summary.latest_branch_success: Stage42-X unified row-level full-waypoint cache passed and Stage42-Y unified ablation evidence passed; Stage42-Y shows UCY source contribution, history-token contribution, and safety-floor necessity.

stage42_c_full_waypoint_dynamics.interpretation: Protected full-waypoint sequence dynamics are positive on ETH_UCY and TrajNet and strengthen world-state evidence, but they do not fully replace the composite-tail linear bridge on all-ADE. Ungated full-waypoint neural remains unsafe.

latest_chinese_goal_summary.current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 composite-tail safe-switch bounded neural dynamics under Stage37/teacher floor
latest_chinese_goal_summary.latest_stage42_p_summary: Stage42-P repaired mean ADE t50 with explicit t50-weighted gain/harm selection, train-only normalization, and validation-only policy selection, but the 3-seed t50 CI low remains negative, so it is not yet a paper-stable t50 claim.
latest_chinese_goal_summary.latest_stage42_r_summary: Stage42-R built a local row prediction cache and completed validation-only row-level combo evaluation for floor / Stage42-J static expert / Stage42-P t50 gain-harm sources; gates 15/15, ADE t50 0.037934, t50 CI low 0.027740, hard/failure 0.054792, easy degradation 0.001102. It remains dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D branch evidence, not metric/seconds-level, Stage5C, or SMC.
latest_chinese_goal_summary.latest_stage42_s_summary: Stage42-S froze the Stage42-R row-cache combo into a lightweight policy artifact with policy/cache/schema hashes and per-domain/per-horizon stress; gates 13/13, positive domains ETH_UCY and TrajNet, UCY fallback-only in this combo stress. It remains dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D branch evidence, not metric/seconds-level, Stage5C, or SMC.
latest_chinese_goal_summary.latest_stage42_t_summary: Stage42-T attempted a validation-only unseen-domain transfer rule for UCY and evaluated UCY once; gates 8/11, UCY all/t50/hard remained 0 because the current Stage42-R row cache has no non-floor Stage42-J/P candidate predictions for UCY. This is a blocker diagnosis, not a success.
latest_chinese_goal_summary.latest_stage42_u_summary: Stage42-U completed a fresh UCY endpoint-to-full bridge audit. Stage41 strict pure-UCY endpoint candidate is available and row-aligned, but linear endpoint-to-full waypoint bridge fails full-waypoint validation and UCY test: UCY all -0.070821, t50 -0.492070, hard/failure -0.083302, easy degradation 0.566646. Verdict is blocker, not success; train/cache a UCY-aware full-waypoint candidate source next.
latest_chinese_goal_summary.latest_stage42_v_summary: Stage42-V fresh-ran strict pure-UCY full-waypoint training. Train students01/students03, val zara01, test zara02/zara03 once. Best ucy_full_waypoint_t50_hard passed 11/11 gates: ADE all 0.220755, t50 0.290332 (CI low 0.231725), t100 raw-frame diagnostic 0.147461, hard/failure 0.229484, easy degradation 0.0, FDE t50 0.334459. This repairs the Stage42-U endpoint-to-full blocker with a real UCY full-waypoint source, but it is not yet merged into Stage42-R/S combo.

next_actions: Stage42-B rebuild source-level or scene-level external validation split from current local state
Stage42-C train/evaluate protected full-waypoint all-agent dynamics against endpoint-only and linear bridge baselines
Stage42-D run retrained causal ablations with bootstrap or seeds
blockers_requiring_user: Verify EWAP t+100 episode construction or provide additional long-horizon pedestrian/drone data.

trials include transformer, JEPA-only, hybrid, t100, MoE variants, all-agent second pass, gain/harm intervention calibrator, t50 rescue, policy blender, and candidate-FDE distiller

all_agent_second_pass.conclusion: All-agent/endpoint-risk neural dynamics did not beat Stage37; Stage37 selector remains current deployable floor.

intervention_calibrator.conclusion: Calibrator is deployable only if it beats Stage37 with easy degradation <=2% and at least two positive domains.

t50_rescue.conclusion: t50 rescue is deployable only if it repairs t50 and beats the Stage37 floor without easy degradation.

policy_blender.conclusion: Policy blender is a negative/diagnostic trial unless it beats Stage37 and preserves easy cases.

candidate_fde_distiller.conclusion: Candidate-FDE distillation learns expected baseline costs and improves over the strongest causal baseline, but remains diagnostic unless it beats Stage37.

blockers: ETH_UCY t50 validation headroom is not representative: val=0.0445, test=0.4881
validation_gap_audit.conclusion: Current ETH_UCY t50 validation headroom is not representative of held-out test headroom; next neural retraining should use the candidate stratified split instead of more threshold tuning on the current split.

stratified_protocol_candidate.conclusion: Candidate protocol shows t50 neural lift after validation stratification, but it is not a deployable claim until confirmed on a locked protocol.

locked_v2_confirmatory_candidate.conclusion: The locked-v2 protocol is derived after validation-gap diagnosis. It is strong evidence for the failure mechanism, but not final deployment proof until accepted as the new locked external protocol or repeated on fresh data.

locked_v2_tail_robust_candidate.conclusion: Tail-robust locked-v2 remains a candidate protocol derived after Stage41 validation-gap diagnosis. It cannot replace Stage37 without protocol acceptance or independent fresh external confirmation.

locked_v2_hard_all_candidate.conclusion: Hard/all locked-v2 remains a candidate protocol derived after Stage41 validation-gap diagnosis. It cannot replace Stage37 without passing all strict margins and independent confirmation.

locked_v2_domain_focused_candidate.conclusion: Domain-focused experts are diagnostic until composed and evaluated under a single validation-selected deployment policy.

locked_v2_domain_expert_composer.conclusion: Domain expert composition is validation-selected candidate evidence; it does not replace Stage37 unless all strict Stage41 margins pass and the protocol is accepted or independently confirmed.

locked_v2_neural_ensemble_candidate.conclusion: This is a neural ensemble over candidate locked-v2 checkpoints. It is useful evidence for dynamics lift, but still not final deployable proof without accepting the locked-v2 protocol or fresh external confirmation.

locked_v2_relaxed_easy_budget_candidate.conclusion: This run is a hypothesis-confirming candidate from failure forensics: neural endpoints contain strong signal, but a fresh locked protocol is required before replacing Stage37.

locked_v2_domain_safe_relaxed_candidate.conclusion: Domain-safe relaxed policy repairs the observed ETH_UCY easy-risk failure mode, but it is still post-diagnostic candidate evidence requiring fresh confirmation before deployment.

locked_v2_fixed_policy_confirmation.conclusion: This audit freezes the post-diagnostic policy and stress-tests it by domain/source/scene, but it does not create a new external dataset or independent locked test. It is not final deployable proof.

source_rotation_fresh_confirmation.conclusion: This is a source-rotation confirmation on existing external datasets, not a new dataset. UCY independent rotation is limited by duplicated zara03 files and only two unique UCY scenes. The fresh run confirms all/hard neural lift but does not fully replace Stage37 because t50 remains below Stage37 and the candidate-oracle t50 ceiling is also below Stage37 on this rotation.

fresh_residual_endpoint_candidate.conclusion: Residual endpoint candidate is bounded by validation-selected uncertainty policy. It is not deployed unless it beats Stage37 on all/t50/hard with easy degradation <=2%.

fresh_bounded_residual_candidate.conclusion: Bounded residual is still dataset-local/raw-frame 2.5D. It does not execute Stage5C or SMC and does not make metric/seconds-level claims.

fresh_endpoint_interpolation_candidate.conclusion: This is a validation-calibrated interpolation of a neural endpoint head, not latent generative rollout. Stage5C and SMC remain disabled.

fresh_endpoint_gain_gate_candidate.conclusion: The gate is a Stage37/source-rotation-protected neural dynamics head. It is not latent generative rollout; Stage5C and SMC remain disabled.

fresh_self_gated_endpoint_candidate.trajectory_endpoint_alignment_status: endpoint_geometry_verified; continuous endpoint interpolation is geometry-aligned but remains safety-gated
fresh_self_gated_endpoint_candidate.conclusion: Self-gated endpoint is still dataset-local 2.5D raw-frame prediction. Endpoint geometry is verified for the rebuilt safety-floor candidate, but deployment remains safety-gated; it is not true 3D, not a foundation model, and does not execute Stage5C or SMC.

pytest.note: .venv-pytorch does not include pytest; tests used python3 while training scripts keep arm64 .venv-pytorch runtime.

bounded_neural_blend_dynamics.interpretation: Strongest fresh-run bounded neural dynamics candidate. It improves the teacher-guided repair on all/t50/t100/hard with easy=0, but still needs bootstrap/multiseed and source-level validation before final freeze.

composite_tail_bounded_neural_evidence.interpretation: Frozen composite-tail policy has positive 2000-bootstrap CI lows on all/t50/t100/hard and positive delta-vs-teacher CI lows. Multiseed and pure-UCY source-level validation are still pending.

composite_tail_bounded_neural_multiseed.interpretation: Composite-tail passes three seed-aware evaluations using the independently trained teacher-guided seed checkpoints; each seed selects composite-tail on validation and evaluates test once.

selection.selection_basis: full validation only; train stress skipped for this tail grid to keep the policy search bounded; test remains single final evaluation

pure_ucy_source_heldout_validation.remaining_blocker: This validates frozen-policy UCY source-heldout behavior, but it is not a pure UCY-only retrain/select/test protocol because the frozen model and safety floor were trained on mixed external train data.
duplicate_blockers: TrajNet/Train/crowds/crowds_zara03.txt and UCY/zara03/crowds_zara03.txt are duplicate-like zara03 sources; they are not counted as independent UCY validation sources.
pure_ucy_source_heldout_validation.caveat: This is a pure-UCY source-heldout frozen-policy check, not a strict pure-UCY-only train/val/test retraining protocol. Coordinates remain dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D.

current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 composite-tail safe-switch bounded neural dynamics under Stage37/teacher floor

m3w_neural_v1_completion_audit.current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 composite-tail safe-switch bounded neural dynamics candidate under Stage37/teacher floor (bootstrap+multiseed+pure-UCY source-heldout, UCY-only policy-head, and strict pure-UCY neural bootstrap evidence supported)

ucy_independent_validation_summary.source_level_blocker: UCY has one train source and no UCY validation source; true source-level UCY validation needs another UCY-like source or a rebuilt split.

endpoint_to_full_trajectory_bridge_summa.caveat: Endpoint neural dynamics are projected through a linear waypoint bridge and evaluated on actual reconstructed future waypoints. This is not learned waypoint-shape dynamics.

no_history.interpretation: Masks history/static causal feature group after policy freeze; proves coverage for no-history/static ablation, not a claim that every history-derived scalar is useless.

no_neighbor.interpretation: Neighbor/interaction masking is audited; group/neighbor features are especially important for the safety head and t100/hard slices.

no_scene_goal.interpretation: Scene/goal proxy coverage exists. Current deployable trajectory path keeps route/physical mostly diagnostic; route/physical heads are not main trajectory deployment claims.

no_interaction.interpretation: Interaction/group-consistency features have explicit ablations and are necessary for guarded deployment; without them raw neural remains less safe.

no_jepa.interpretation: JEPA is explicitly disabled from the deployable path because audited JEPA variants were non-collapse but did not give deployable downstream lift. Stage41 now also records same-protocol pure-Transformer/no-JEPA attempts as negative or fallback-only, so the current positive path is protected endpoint neural dynamics rather than JEPA/Transformer purity.

no_transformer.interpretation: Stage41 same-protocol JEPA-only/no-Transformer attempts are negative or unsafe, so no-Transformer is covered as negative architecture evidence. This is not a claim that JEPA contributes to the deployable path; it is why JEPA remains diagnostic-only.

no_fallback.interpretation: No-fallback neural often improves hard/all raw error but catastrophically damages easy cases; fallback is required for deployability.

learned_waypoint_shape_summary.caveat: Learned waypoint-shape residual contribution is positive but small and protected by endpoint bridge/floor fallback; it is not an ungated full-row neural replacement.

m3w_neural_v1_current_candidate.current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 composite-tail safe-switch bounded neural dynamics candidate under Stage37/teacher floor (bootstrap+multiseed+pure-UCY source-heldout, UCY-only policy-head, and strict pure-UCY neural bootstrap evidence supported)
m3w_neural_v1_current_candidate.row_level_ucy_repaired_note: Higher row-level FDE than group-safe variants, but raw repaired policy increased near-proximity risk in joint rollout audit.
m3w_neural_v1_current_candidate.endpoint_to_full_bridge_caveat: Endpoint neural dynamics are projected through a linear waypoint bridge and evaluated on actual reconstructed future waypoints. This is not learned waypoint-shape dynamics.
m3w_neural_v1_current_candidate.learned_shape_caveat: Learned waypoint-shape residual contribution is positive but small and protected by endpoint bridge/floor fallback; it is not an ungated full-row neural replacement.
m3w_neural_v1_current_candidate.ucy_source_level_blocker: UCY has one train source and no UCY validation source; true source-level UCY validation needs another UCY-like source or a rebuilt split.

latest_evidence: Stage41 weighted pairwise source switching upweighted hard/tail/positive-gain rows but still did not replace fixed composer: ETH_UCY remains below fixed and TrajNet t50 remains below fixed, so simple label imbalance is not the blocker.

stage41_learned_waypoint_shape_bridge.interpretation: Past-only waypoint-shape residual head passes a protected two-domain gate, but the learned-shape contribution is tiny and mostly t100/tail-specific; it is not an ungated learned full-waypoint dynamics replacement.

stage41_learned_shape_gain_gate.interpretation: Train-fitted shape gain/harm calibration expands ETH_UCY shape intervention and improves TrajNet t50 shape gain, but it is not a monotonic upgrade over the previous learned-shape bridge; next is a domain/horizon-specific shape-policy composer.

stage41_calibrated_shape_meta_policy.overall_interpretation: Simple affine calibration did not repair ETH_UCY ranking; validation selected no calibration and fixed horizon composer remains safer deployable shape policy.

stage41_pairwise_shape_switch_policy.overall_interpretation: Pairwise gain/harm switching is safe and two-domain positive, but fixed horizon composer remains the safer deployable shape policy because ETH_UCY weakens versus fixed and TrajNet t50 falls.

stage41_weighted_pairwise_shape_switch_p.overall_interpretation: Hard/tail/positive-gain weighting is safe but not deployable over fixed composer; remaining source-switch blocker is likely feature insufficiency or missing per-domain/t50 source priors, not simple positive-label imbalance.

fixed_prior_source_switch_policy_summary.interpretation: Treating fixed composer as the safety prior avoids t50 harm but does not improve over the fixed composer; fixed composer/composite remains deployable.

fixed_prior_oracle_audit_summary.interpretation: Residual source-switch oracle headroom over the fixed composer is tiny and present in only about 0.1% of rows; stop spending trials on source-switch learners without new data/features.

m3w_neural_v1_goal_completion_audit.current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 composite-tail safe-switch bounded neural dynamics candidate under Stage37/teacher floor (bootstrap+multiseed+pure-UCY source-heldout, UCY-only policy-head, and strict pure-UCY neural bootstrap evidence supported)

full_retrain_boundary.reason: Stage42-D fresh-runs the safety/floor/full-waypoint ablations and verifies prior Stage30/41 retrained or architecture ablations by hash/source. It does not retrain every JEPA/Transformer/history/scene/goal component again in this command.
full_retrain_boundary.honest_source_policy: fresh_run rows are recomputed this stage; cached_verified rows are old evidence with schema/hash/no-leakage provenance; not_run rows must remain not_run.

floor_necessity_analysis.why: Ungated neural improves raw errors but violates easy safety. Validation-selected internal/harm/uncertainty gates are reported separately; only deployable families may be considered for floor reduction, never Stage5C/SMC execution.

claim_matrix.claim: protected external raw-frame 2.5D world-state dynamics improves over Stage37/strongest floor
full-waypoint sequence dynamics exists beyond endpoint-only linear bridge
claim_matrix.evidence: full-waypoint ADE all=0.1858, t50=0.1480, t100diag=0.2286, positive_domains=['ETH_UCY', 'TrajNet']

claim_matrix.claim: ungated neural can replace safety floor
metric or seconds-level pedestrian world model

claim_matrix.evidence: all Stage42 claim boundaries keep true_3d=false and foundation_world_model=false
ablation coverage=True; all Stage42-D component retraining=False
A-E evidence is organized and strong for a protected 2.5D paper; full retrained ablation, metric/time calibration, independent external expansion, and floor-free safety remain gaps.

not_run_boundaries.no_jepa: not_run_in_phase1; current deployable path does not use JEPA features, and JEPA remains diagnostic-only from Stage18/19/41 evidence.
not_run_boundaries.full_transformer_retrain: not_run_in_phase1; this phase retrains ridge expected-FDE selectors on causal external features, not torch Transformer checkpoints.
not_run_boundaries.no_endpoint_bridge: not_run_in_phase1; Stage42-C has fresh full-waypoint vs endpoint-linear comparisons, but this phase does not retrain the waypoint model.
not_run_boundaries.no_full_waypoint_shape: not_run_in_phase1; Stage42-C covers protected full-waypoint sequence dynamics, but all-component waypoint-shape retraining remains open.

stage_i_sequence_to_full_waypoint.stage42_i_failure_reason: full static+sequence waypoint head is ADE-negative; no-static-context variant is positive, suggesting static/context overfit or cross-domain scale mismatch

stage42_u_ucy_candidate_bridge.root_cause: Stage41 pure-UCY endpoint residual is positive on endpoint FDE, but linear endpoint-to-waypoint interpolation is negative on Stage42 full-waypoint validation and UCY test. Endpoint success cannot be counted as full-waypoint world-state success.
stage42_u_ucy_candidate_bridge.next_action: Train/cache a UCY-aware full-waypoint candidate source with train/val source split, or learn a waypoint-shape bridge selected on validation; do not merge this endpoint bridge into Stage42-R/S deployable policy.

stage42_v_ucy_full_waypoint_candidate.protocol: train UCY students01/students03, val UCY zara01, test UCY zara02/zara03 once
stage42_v_ucy_full_waypoint_candidate.next_action: Integrate Stage42-V UCY full-waypoint candidate source into Stage42-R/S row-combo policy as Stage42-W.
